_comment: Canonical training eras for the Elo trajectory analysis. Edit this file to update era boundaries or add new eras as the project progresses. Used by analyze_elo_trajectory.py.

eras.name: BC base (init)
eras.description: BC starting point. Init-from for all v9 PPO runs.

eras.name: Pre-fix early PPO collapse
eras.description: Early PPO before type effectiveness features. Model actively degraded vs BC due to wrong optimization signal.

eras.name: Type+Switch eff breakthrough
eras.description: Session 30 breakthrough: type effectiveness features added (+~190 Elo gain), switch effectiveness + floor fix added shortly after.

eras.name: Stability patches era
eras.description: Post-breakthrough steady climb. NaN abort, -100 masking, ent_coef tuning, KL gate. Many minor fixes, generally stable.

eras.name: KL gate / old smart_avg peak
eras.description: Iter 699 was the old 'all-time peak' by smart_avg (57%). Elo measurement showed it was actually mid-pack at ~998.

eras.name: S31 root-cause fixes
eras.description: Session 31: FP16 NaN fix, snapshot pool pruning, lr-restart investigation. Stable era with slight improvement.

eras.name: S32 speed work + tweaks
eras.description: Session 32: batched temporal, pipeline, snapshot pool overhauls, lr-restart events, adaptive entropy experiments, reward shaping changes. MULTIPLE DISRUPTIVE TWEAKS — caused -13 Elo regression vs E6.

eras.name: S33 terminal reward (stable)
eras.description: Session 33: terminal reward locked in, no more reward experiments, stable training. Recovered from S32 regression and slightly exceeded E6 best. Snapshot 1784 was Elo 1032 (all-time high at the time).

eras.name: S35 Exp 1 (lam=0.95, ent=0.02)
eras.description: Session 35 Exp 1: lambda=0.95, ent=0.02. Elo +25 over baseline (sp1984=1028 vs sp1784=1003). Eval floor rose 49->53%, ceiling 56->60%. But entropy drifted from 0.84 to 0.52 and evals declined from peak 60% back to 52% by iter ~2150. Entropy too low. Peak at iter 2019 (savg=60%).

eras.name: S35 Exp 1b (lam=0.95, ent=0.03)
eras.description: Session 35 Exp 1b: restarted from E9 peak (snapshot_2019) with ent=0.03. Entropy recovered (0.77->1.06) but overshot — too exploratory. SP win% declining. Ran 210 iters (2020-2230 in log, branched at 2119).

eras.name: S36 Exp 1c (lam=0.95, ent=0.02)
eras.description: Session 36 Exp 1c: resumed from Exp 1b snapshot_2119 (healthy entropy ~0.93) with ent=0.02. Best run: savg=54.6, entropy stable ~0.85, 0% evals below 50%. 425 iters. Interrupted by Windows BSOD at iter 2544.

eras.name: S36 Exp 2+3 (permutation + PFSP)
eras.description: Session 36 Exp 2+3: slot permutation augmentation + PFSP opponent sampling. Resumed from Exp 1c snapshot_2539. Path separator bug fixed at iter 2700. KL turbulence 2760-2800 (epoch-0 early stops), recovering by 2810. Eval ~52.8% (below Exp 1c 54.6 baseline, pending recovery).
